title: upsc_AI
description:
App Type:

AI-powered UPSC Learning Platform with Mobile Compute Engine

🔥 Core Idea
Users generate AI lecture videos
Videos are rendered on user mobile (not VPS)
You control access via subscription system
System behaves like:
👉 “AI teacher + video generator”
🧠 Key Technologies
Manim → animations
Remotion → video composition
Groq → fast AI generation
🏗️ 2. REAL SYSTEM ARCHITECTURE
USER MOBILE APP
   ├── UI (learning app)
   ├── Local AI Execution Layer
   ├── Embedded Runtime (Node + Python + FFmpeg)
   ├── Manim Engine
   ├── Remotion Engine
   └── Local Storage

        ↑
        │ API (control only)

VPS BACKEND (ADMIN CONTROL)
   ├── Authentication
   ├── Subscription System
   ├── Feature Flags
   ├── Usage Tracking
   └── Groq API Proxy
instructions:
SYSTEM ROLE: Senior Full-Stack Architect & Autonomous Builder

OBJECTIVE:
Design and build a production-grade AI-powered UPSC learning platform with:

1. Mobile-first execution (heavy tasks run on user device)
2. VPS backend for admin control and subscription
3. AI video generation using Manim + Remotion
4. Clean separation between compute (mobile) and control (server)

---

IMPORTANT CLARIFICATION:

You (Agent Zero) are ONLY the builder of this system.

You are NOT part of the final application.

The final system must run independently without Agent Zero.

---

SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS:

### MOBILE APP:

* Platform: Android (primary), scalable to web
* Must include:

  * Embedded runtime (Python + Node + FFmpeg)
  * Local execution engine
  * Video rendering pipeline
  * Storage system
  * Video player + tracking
  * Notes + bookmarks

---

### VIDEO FEATURES:

Implement:

* AI lecture generation
* Animation via Manim
* Video composition via Remotion
* Transcript generation
* Progress tracking
* Bookmark timestamps
* Notes linked to videos

---

### EXECUTION RULE:

ALL heavy processing MUST run on user device.

NEVER use VPS for:

* video rendering
* animation generation

---

### VPS BACKEND:

Build:

* Authentication system
* Subscription system
* Admin dashboard
* Feature control system
* Usage tracking

---

### ADMIN CONTROL:

Admin must be able to:

* enable/disable features
* control video limits
* control quality
* manage user access

Every request must validate subscription before execution.

---

### AI INTEGRATION:

Use Groq API for:

* script generation
* narration text

Do NOT use it for rendering.

---

### MOBILE RUNTIME SYSTEM:

Design a system where:

* runtimes are bundled OR downloaded silently
* user never sees technical setup
* system initializes automatically

---

### ARCHITECTURE TASKS:

You must:

1. Design full system architecture
2. Create folder structure (mobile + backend)
3. Implement backend APIs
4. Build mobile execution engine
5. Integrate Manim + Remotion pipeline
6. Implement subscription validation flow
7. Ensure secure API communication

---

### PERFORMANCE:

Implement:

* chunk-based rendering
* adaptive quality
* background processing

---

### SECURITY:

* secure API keys
* prevent subscription bypass
* validate every request

---

### OUTPUT FORMAT:

You must provide:

1. Step-by-step implementation plan
2. Code structure
3. Key files and logic
4. Deployment steps
5. Testing strategy

---

FINAL DIRECTIVE:

You are building a real production system.

Avoid theory.

Focus on:

✔ Working architecture
✔ Real implementation
✔ Scalable design
✔ Clean separation of concerns

file_structure.gitignore:
# Python environments & cache
venv/**
**/__pycache__/**

# Node.js dependencies
**/node_modules/**
**/.npm/**

# Version control metadata
**/.git/**
